ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fire_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire department */,
  "header_key" TEXT /* Header key assigned to the fire department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fire department */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the fire department is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the fire department is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the fire department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fire department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the fire department */,
  "department_website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "department_established" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  "number_of_fire_stations" INTEGER /* Number of fire stations under the department */,
  "total_personnel" INTEGER /* Total number of personnel in the department */,
  "total_apparatus" INTEGER /* Total number of apparatus in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fire department reporting the incident */,
  "reporting_year" INTEGER /* Year the incident was reported */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the incident by the fire department */,
  "exposure_number" INTEGER /* Number of exposures (if any) */,
  "incident_type_code" INTEGER /* Code for the type of incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "aid_given_received_code" TEXT /* Code indicating if aid was given or received */,
  "aid_given_received" TEXT /* Description of aid given or received */,
  "number_of_alarms" INTEGER /* Number of alarms raised for the incident */,
  "alarm_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the alarm was raised */,
  "arrival_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the first unit arrived at the scene */,
  "incident_controlled_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was controlled */,
  "last_unit_cleared_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the last unit cleared the scene */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the incident occurred */,
  "actions_taken_1" TEXT /* Actions taken during the incident (1st action) */,
  "actions_taken_2" TEXT /* Actions taken during the incident (2nd action) */,
  "actions_taken_3" TEXT /* Actions taken during the incident (3rd action) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property involved in the incident */,
  "property_loss" REAL /* Loss to the property value */,
  "contents_value" REAL /* Value of the contents involved in the incident */,
  "contents_loss" REAL /* Loss to the contents value */,
  "fire_service_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of fire service deaths */,
  "fire_service_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of fire service injuries */,
  "other_fire_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of other fire deaths */,
  "other_fire_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of other fire injuries */,
  "detector_alerted_code" TEXT /* Code indicating if a detector alerted */,
  "detector_alerted_occupants" TEXT /* Description of occupants alerted by the detector */,
  "hazardous_materials_released_code" TEXT /* Code indicating if hazardous materials were released */,
  "hazardous_materials_released" TEXT /* Description of hazardous materials released */,
  "mixed_use_property_code" TEXT /* Code indicating if the property is mixed use */,
  "mixed_use_property" TEXT /* Description of mixed use property */,
  "property_use_code" TEXT /* Code indicating the primary use of the property */,
  "property_use" TEXT /* Description of the primary use of the property */,
  "incident_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the incident */,
  "incident_cause" TEXT /* The cause of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  "incident_photos" TEXT /* URLs of photos of the incident */,
  "incident_videos" TEXT /* URLs of videos of the incident */,
  "incident_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_code") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_location_id") REFERENCES incident_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES fire_departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the incident location */,
  "apartment_number" TEXT /* Apartment number (if applicable) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the incident location */,
  "census_tract" TEXT /* Census tract of the incident location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "nearest_fire_station" TEXT /* Nearest fire station to the incident location */,
  "distance_to_nearest_fire_station" REAL /* Distance to the nearest fire station */,
  "incident_location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "number_of_suppression_apparatus" INTEGER /* Number of suppression apparatus used */,
  "number_of_suppression_personnel" INTEGER /* Number of suppression personnel involved */,
  "number_of_ems_apparatus" INTEGER /* Number of EMS apparatus used */,
  "number_of_ems_personnel" INTEGER /* Number of EMS personnel involved */,
  "number_of_other_apparatus" INTEGER /* Number of other apparatus used */,
  "number_of_other_personnel" INTEGER /* Number of other personnel involved */,
  "mutual_aid_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual aid department (if applicable) */,
  "mutual_aid_department_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual aid department (if applicable) */,
  "total_water_used" REAL /* Total amount of water used during the incident */,
  "total_foam_used" REAL /* Total amount of foam used during the incident */,
  "total_hazardous_materials_used" REAL /* Total amount of hazardous materials used during the incident */,
  "total_time_on_scene" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the scene by all units (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_resources_mutual_aid_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutual_aid_department_id") REFERENCES fire_departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_resources_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fire chief, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., Fire Chief, Analyst) */,
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_lockout_status" TEXT /* Lockout status of the user (e.g., locked, unlocked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_department_id") REFERENCES fire_departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the incident was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the incident (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the incident */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_code" INTEGER /* Code for the incident type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident type (e.g., structural, vehicle, wildland) */,
  "type_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the incident type (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "type_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
